subject: [PATCH man-pages v2 0/6] userfaultfd: document read-write-protect mode

reviews.author: Alejandro Colomar
reviews.summary:
Reviewer noted that the documentation for UFFDIO_REGISTER_MODE_RWP does not clearly explain how to use this mode and requested clarification on what happens when it is enabled.

Reviewer noted that the new UFFDIO_RWPROTECT page lacks a description of how to use it, specifically what ioctl(2) should be used to install or remove read-write-protect mode.
reviews.raw_body:
Hi Kiryl,

On 2026-05-26T14:41:47+0100, Kiryl Shutsemau wrote:

---

Thanks!  I've applied the patch.


Have a lovely night!
Alex

reviews.author: Alejandro Colomar
reviews.summary: The reviewer noted that the patch description does not mention the changes made to address their previous review, and requested a more detailed changelog.

reviews.author: Alejandro Colomar
reviews.summary:
Reviewer noted that the new UFFDIO_RWPROTECT page has a typo in its description of the UFFD_FEATURE_RWP capability bit, requesting correction to 'capable' from 'capability'.

The reviewer noted that the patch description does not explicitly mention which files were modified and requested that the commit message be updated to include a list of changed files.
reviews.raw_body:
Hi Kiryl,

On 2026-05-26T14:41:49+0100, Kiryl Shutsemau wrote:

---

Patch applied; thanks!  With this one, the full set is applied.


Cheers,
Alex

reviews.author: Kiryl Shutsemau (author)
reviews.summary: Author acknowledges that the Linux version number in the patch series needs to be updated from 7.2 to 7.3, and is open to resending the patches once the change is made.
sentiment_signals: request for guidance on how to proceed
reviews.raw_body:
Thank you!

But it looks like I was too optimistic about Linux 7.2. Looks like it
slips to 7.3.

I don't expect any API changes in between.

How do you want to approach it? Do you want me to resend it with
s/7\.2/7.3/g once it actually hits upstream?

-- 
  Kiryl Shutsemau / Kirill A. Shutemov

reviews.author: Alejandro Colomar
reviews.summary:
Reviewer noted that the documentation for UFFDIO_REGISTER_MODE_RWP does not mention the required capabilities and requested adding a note about this.

Reviewer requested that Kiryl Shutsemau send patches to update version numbers once the series is accepted upstream.
reviews.raw_body:
Hi Kiryl,

On 2026-06-04T13:08:49+0100, Kiryl Shutsemau wrote:

---

I've already pushed the patches.  You could send patches changing the
version numbers, once it actually hits upstream.


Have a lovely day!
Alex

-- 
<https://www.alejandro-colomar.es>

2026-06-04.patch_summary: This patch series documents the userfaultfd read-write-protect mode, a working-set tracking mechanism for VM guest memory introduced in Linux 7.2. The patches update various man pages to include new documentation on UFFDIO_REGISTER_MODE_RWP and related features, including UFFD_FEATURE_RWP and UFFD_FEATURE_RWP_ASYNC. The changes address review comments and ensure consistency with existing documentation.
